item.title: Dadlan 2k19
item.description: dadlan.com is here! Hugo is pretty rad Spring (Liberty Lake, WA) lol too many naps.
item.content:
dadlan.com is here!

Hugo is pretty rad

Spring (Liberty Lake, WA)

lol too many naps.

item.title: Dadlan 2k18
item.description: Spring (Liberty Lake, WA) So much Kingdom Come Matt and Jordon destroying everyone in Quake and Overwatch Chris drove across the state to take naps Alan threw up in Riley’s car Fall (Leavenworth, WA) Edibles for days Jumping into frigid waters Serious Sam is Serious Zach can clear a room of nerds Hitting on photographers
item.content:
Spring (Liberty Lake, WA)

  • So much Kingdom Come
  • Matt and Jordon destroying everyone in Quake and Overwatch
  • Chris drove across the state to take naps
  • Alan threw up in Riley’s car

Fall (Leavenworth, WA)

  • Edibles for days
  • Jumping into frigid waters
  • Serious Sam is Serious
  • Zach can clear a room of nerds
  • Hitting on photographers
